4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","zk-layer",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","zk-layer","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/16f3b3rhk3fwn.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0iywei4pzeiss.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/10_9opwzz0v93.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable that validate private governance data without changing the deployed contracts or current frontend lifecycle."}]}],["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","p","p-40",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Phase A now also adds a parallel on-chain verification receipt path for proposal-bound proof bundles. This means the repository no longer stops at on-chain proof anchoring alone; it can now bind a proposal-scoped verification receipt on-chain without replacing the existing commit-reveal lifecycle."}]}],["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","p","p-42",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Current live stack:"}]}],["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","ul","l-59",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-59-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`private_dao_vote_overlay`"}],["$","li","l-59-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"vote form validity"}],["$","li","l-59-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"threshold eligibility"}],["$","li","l-59-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal-scoped commitment binding"}],["$","li","l-59-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal-scoped nullifier binding"}],"$L21","$L22","$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29"]}]}],"$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c"]}]}]}]

2a:["$","$1","block-14",{"children":["$","h2","h2-62",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Current Commit-Reveal vs ZK-Augmented Governance"}]}]

2f:["$","$1","block-19",{"children":["$","h2","h2-90",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"What The ZK Layer Does Not Claim Yet"}]}]
